description: The 'Ndrina Sergi is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia organization, originating from Platì, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking, particularly cocaine and heroin, operating in northern Italy (Milan area), Rome, and Australia since at least the 1970s. The clan has been implicated in kidnappings, murders, and political corruption, with several members arrested in major operations like Nord-Sud and Marine.

country_links.evidence_quote: All'estero c'è una forte presenza almeno dagli anni '70 in Australia.
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Sergi has had a strong presence in Australia since at least the 1970s.

country_links.evidence_quote: i quali la importavano dalla Colombia e dal Marocco
country_links.context: The Sergi and Marando imported cocaine from Colombia.
